title: Oven Brite All-in-1 Oven Cleaner | Cleans Inside the Oven - Transforms Racks and Grills | Powerful, Fume-Free, Easy-To-Use Formula (500ml Bottle, Bag & Gloves Included)
features: ALL-IN-1 KIT: These oven cleaner kits come complete with a 500ml bottle, a heavy-duty bag, and gloves. Everything is included for a full oven clean, making it simple to achieve sparkling results at home.
HEAVY DUTY POWER: These heavy duty oven cleaners cut through burnt-on food, grease, and grime with ease. Ideal for busy kitchens where the oven sees daily use, it leaves everything fresh and clean.
CLEANS RACKS & GRILLS: These oven cleaner kits include a soaking bag designed to transform racks and grills. Simply place them inside with the solution for a deep clean that restores their shine.
CLEANS INSIDE OVENS: These oven cleaners work wonders inside the oven too, making light work of tough build-ups. Perfect for preparing the kitchen before a big family dinner or festive feast.
FUME FREE FORMULA: These fume free oven cleaners are safe to use in the home. With no harsh odours, cleaning feels easier and more pleasant, even when the job is a big one.
FANTASTIC RESULTS: These oven cleaner kits deliver professional-looking results without the cost of a service. They leave ovens gleaming and racks spotless.
EASY TO USE: Simple, stress-free kitchen cleaner. With clear instructions and everything included, they take the hassle out of one of the toughest cleaning jobs.
TIME SAVING CLEAN: These oven cleaner heavy duty solutions get to work fast, lifting dirt and grime with minimal effort. Perfect for busy households that need quick but effective results.
COMPLETE CLEANER IN A BOX: These kits give everything needed in one purchase, from solution to gloves. Great for moving into a new home, spring cleaning, or gifting to someone special.
TRUSTED BRAND: Oven Brite cleaners are trusted by households across the UK for consistent results. They make oven cleaning easy, effective, and affordable.
description: Product Description Keeping an oven clean can feel like the toughest kitchen task, but Oven Brite makes it simple. This all-in-1 oven cleaner kit delivers heavy duty cleaning power without the fuss, combining everything needed in one handy box. With a powerful, fume-free solution, it transforms even the dirtiest ovens, racks and grills back to sparkling clean. Each kit contains a 500ml bottle of cleaning solution, a strong bag for soaking racks, and gloves for safe use. Designed to cut through grease and burnt-on food, this kitchen cleaner is trusted to achieve fantastic results time after time. Perfect for busy households, it’s easy to use and saves time, leaving ovens shining like new. Whether it’s a deep clean before hosting guests, or a regular freshen up, Oven Brite is the complete solution for tackling tough oven grime. Ingredients 5-15% Sodium Hydroxide, Anionic Surfactants <5% Amphoteric Surfactants Directions To begin, refer to the oven cleaning manual/instructions to ensure the product is suitable for your oven. Please ensure you have read through all the safety instructions and information on the box prior to use. Inspect the gloves and bag provided and do not use if they are damaged in any way. Ensure the bag has no leaks by filling with water prior to use. Empty water out before use. To clean racks and grills: Carefully place up to 2 racks into the bag provided, taking care not to puncture or tear the bag. Add approximately 2/3 of the oven cleaner and seal the bag, dispelling as much air as possible. Fold the bag around the rack(s) and gently tilt the bag until the racks are coated with the cleaning solution and leave for 2 hours. After 2 hours tilt the bag again, to re-coat the rack(s) and soak for a further 4 hours. For best results, leave overnight. To remove the rack(s), open the bag and pull downwards at the sides. Do not reach inside. Remove the rack(s) and rinse carefully with hot soapy water. Disposal: Partially fill the bag with water, seal and tilt so the solution collects in one bottom corner. Cut off the other corner of the bag and then tilt back to allow the residue to be safely poured away down the sink. To clean inside the oven: Pour some of the remaining solution into the centre of the oven. Apply to the areas to be cleaned using a cloth/sponge. Leave to soak for at least 4 hours, for best results leave overnight. Avoid contact with the oven door seals, trims, glass panel, pilot light or heating and fan elements. Protect surfaces around the oven. Remove residue with a cloth/sponge and rinse with hot soapy water. A second application may be required depending on build up. Disposal: Simply rinse the bottle with water and dispose of in a safe way. Manufacturer Contact Information Oven Brite Total Oven Clean 500ml See more
